channel.title: CLI on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in CLI on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Enterprise-managed OpenTelemetry export for VS Code and CLI
item.description:
GitHub Copilot now supports enterprise-managed OpenTelemetry export for VS Code and CLI, letting organizations direct telemetry to an approved collector centrally instead of requiring developers to set OTEL_* environment variables. The configuration is delivered through enterprise-managed settings.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Improved accuracy and coverage in Copilot usage metrics reports
item.description:
GitHub improved the Copilot usage metrics API to make reports more complete and accurate. The update adds support for Copilot CLI suggested lines of code and includes users that were previously only partially captured.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Set AI credit session limits in Copilot CLI and SDK
item.description:
GitHub Copilot CLI and the GitHub Copilot SDK now support AI credit session limits, letting you cap how much an agent can spend in a single session. This is intended to help control usage during longer-running agent workflows.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot code review: Analysis depth and efficiency updates
item.description:
Copilot code review now uses built-in file exploration tools from the Copilot CLI and SDK. GitHub says this improves review cost efficiency without changing the existing workflow.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: New features and Claude as agent provider preview in JetBrains IDEs
item.description:
GitHub added support for organization and enterprise agents in JetBrains IDEs, along with Copilot CLI message queueing/steering and a new agent debug logs summary view. The update also previews Claude as an agent provider in JetBrains IDEs.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Read remote repository content with GitHub CLI
item.description:
GitHub CLI now includes two commands for reading repository content without cloning: gh repo read-file and gh repo read-dir. These let you inspect remote files and directories directly from the terminal.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Enterprise-managed settings now support bypass permission controls
item.description:
Enterprise administrators can now set disableBypassPermissionsMode to "disable" in enterprise-managed settings.json to prevent GitHub Copilot CLI and VS Code from bypassing permission controls.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: CLI and SDK support for Deployment Templates
item.description:
Azure Machine Learning deployment templates now support management through the CLI and SDK in public preview. Platform teams can create, update, delete, and manage templates from infrastructure-as-code pipelines instead of using only the Azure portal.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Copilot-assisted coding & agent skills to build, deploy, and run Azure Functions faster in VS Code, CLI, and azd
item.description:
Azure Functions public preview adds Copilot-assisted coding and agent skills for building, deploying, and running Functions apps in VS Code, the CLI, and azd. The preview aims to improve AI help quality by providing Azure Functions-specific guidance.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Introducing Copilot CLI and agentic capabilities enhancements in JetBrains IDEs
item.description:
GitHub added Copilot CLI support to Copilot for JetBrains IDEs and expanded agentic capabilities in the IDE integration. The update focuses on new Copilot CLI session features plus additional workflow improvements.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Gemini models in Copilot CLI, cloud agent, and the Copilot app
item.description:
GitHub added Gemini 3.1 Pro (Preview) and Gemini 3.5 Flash to more Copilot surfaces. The models are now available in Copilot CLI, Copilot cloud agent, and the GitHub Copilot app.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot Memory has more controls for deletion, scope, and the Copilot CLI
item.description:
GitHub updated Copilot Memory with better deletion controls, a repository-level disable option, and additional memory controls in Copilot CLI. The feature remains in public preview.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Remote control for Copilot CLI sessions now generally available on mobile, web, and VS Code
item.description:
Remote control for Copilot CLI sessions is now generally available on GitHub Mobile and github.com, with support also referenced for VS Code. It lets you start work in the terminal and continue managing the session from mobile or web.

  • Source: GitHub
